Why is Healthcare in China So Difficult for Expats?

Digital Barriers

Hospital systems are locked inside Chinese apps. Without local ID or a Chinese phone number, booking is nearly impossible.

Communication Gaps

Medical jargon is complex. Even if doctors speak basic English, crucial nuances of side effects, dosages, and follow-ups are easily lost.

Procedural Maze

Triage, registration, payment, tests, and pharmacy are scattered across floors. For a foreigner, the hospital process is an exhausting labyrinth.


Core Module 1

Comprehensive Checkups
& Advanced Imaging

  • Access International Departments of China’s top-tier public hospitals.

  • Choose from 7 bespoke packages (A-G) tailored to your specific health needs.

  • Skip the queue with fast-track advanced imaging completed in 1-3 days.

Routine Dental Care


  • Cleaning & Fillings: Zero wait time. We arrange digital dental centers with German/Swiss materials for same-day completion.

  • Ultimate Value: Enjoy international hygiene standards at a fraction of Western costs.


Optical & Express Glasses


  • Expert Optometry: Advanced equipment ensures precise prescriptions.

  • 4-Hour Express Glasses: China is the world’s lens manufacturing hub. We guide you to professional centers to customize high-quality anti-blue light or progressive lenses in just one afternoon.

Transparent Pricing: Every Cent Spent on Your Health

PT5 enforces a strict separation between service fees and medical costs.
All medical bills (checkups, pharmacy) are paid directly to the hospital. PT5 strictly prohibits medical kickbacks—we only charge a transparent flat fee.

How It Works:
3 Steps to Peace of Mind

Skip the endless queuing and experience efficient healthcare delivery modern China has to offer under the guidance of PT5 experts.

1

Submit Inquiry

Submit your city and medical needs. An expert will reply within 12 hours and initiate a consultation chat.

2

Expert Matching

We assign a dedicated guide, communicate precautions, and seamlessly organize all your pre-visit documents.

3

On-Site Guardian

Your guide waits for you in the lobby and handles all the running around. You just sit comfortably and talk to the doctor.

“Your Health
Should Speak No Language Barriers.”

Send Us a Message




Commitment: We strictly respect your privacy. We guarantee a reply within 12 hours.

F.A.Q

Got Questions?
We’ve Got Answers.

Everything you need to know about PT5 Health and how we make your medical journey in China completely stress-free.

Still have questions?

Can’t find the answer you’re looking for? Please chat to our friendly team directly.


Contact Support

A PT5 guide is your personal on-site bilingual concierge. We handle appointment booking, hospital navigation, queueing, simultaneous translation during doctor consultations, pharmacy runs, and report printing. You just sit comfortably while we manage the chaos.

You pay all medical fees directly to the hospital. PT5 operates on a strict zero-kickback policy. We only charge a transparent, flat service fee for our escort and translation services.

While public hospital queues for MRIs can take weeks, our experts know the fast-track processes. In most cases, we can secure an imaging slot within 1 to 3 days at top-tier international departments.

Yes! We assist you in gathering all necessary documents—such as official receipts (Fapiao), translated medical records, and doctor’s notes—ensuring you have exactly what your insurance provider requires for a smooth reimbursement claim.

We primarily operate in China’s Tier-1 cities, focusing on top-tier public hospitals with renowned International Departments (VIP clinics). Please submit an inquiry with your location, and our team will confirm availability.

Our guides are highly experienced medical interpreters and hospital navigators, not licensed physicians. Their expertise lies in bridging the language gap, understanding complex hospital workflows, and ensuring accurate communication between you and top Chinese doctors.

Your connection with your PT5 guide doesn’t end when you leave the hospital. We offer remote sourcing and follow-up services, keeping in touch via WhatsApp or WeChat to help you retrieve later reports or arrange prescription refills.

Both! We offer 7 bespoke comprehensive checkup packages (Packages A-G) for preventative care, as well as specialized escorts for targeted treatments, dental care, or advanced diagnostic imaging.

Not at all. That is exactly why we are here. From the moment you contact us until you receive your final translated medical reports, your bilingual PT5 guide ensures you understand every detail of your health journey.

Simply fill out the “Send Us a Message” form with your city and medical needs. A PT5 expert will reach out to you via email or WhatsApp within 12 hours to discuss your tailored plan and assign your dedicated guide.

About PT5 Ecosystem

We are NOT a Travel Agency.
We are Your Trust Anchor in China.

Our mission is “Serve the People, Bridge the World.” We eliminate the extreme information gap for foreigners in China through absolute transparency and white-glove execution.

P

Partner First.

Multi-to-One Service

Every partner is supported by a dedicated group: Supervisor, Manager, Agent, and Assistants working for your success.

T

Transparent.

Zero Information Gap

Direct factory pricing with 100% visibility. We charge a fixed service fee; what the factory quotes is what the client pays.

5

5 Promises.

Unmatched Delivery

  • Transparent Pricing [cite: 659]
  • Strict Quality Vetting [cite: 661]
  • Rapid Claim Response [cite: 661]
  • Pro Customization [cite: 633]
  • Lifetime Support [cite: 633]

Why Partners Trust PT5

Sourcing & Logistics Hub

Direct access to 1688 and verified factories. Professional warehouses in Shanghai and Guangdong for seamless QC and global forwarding[cite: 16, 633].

Transparent Commission

We shared the factory quotes directly. Our income comes from a fixed service commission (10% down to 5%), establishing lifelong trust[cite: 195, 213].

Rapid Insurance & Refund

Damaged or missing parcels? We provide a 3-day rapid claim response, ensuring full compensation or resend services[cite: 649, 661].

Direct Channel
How do I communicate with the team? Is it complicated? 😅

Super Simple! We use WhatsApp or WeChat groups for multi-to-one instant communication. Zero learning curve. ⚡

Can I see the factory and products before shipping? 🤔

Absolutely! Real-time QC videos and photos are shared for every order. Full transparency is our promise. 📸 [cite: 661]



Connect via WhatsApp

Partner Support Direct Line

Clear the Roadblocks

Transparent answers for long-term growth. We build on trust, not fine print.

What happens if my follower bypasses me and contacts the guide directly?

It’s structurally impossible. Our system hard-codes the customer’s initial ID to your referral link based on our transparency commitment. Even if they privately contact a guide later, the algorithm permanently credits you.

How exactly do I withdraw my earnings?

We support PayPal, Wise, USDT, and global bank wire transfers. You can withdraw anytime your balance hits $50. All billing standards are public and verifiable.

Is the extra “2% Ambassador Bonus” permanent?

Yes, entirely permanent[cite: 654]. Current beta slots are reserved for pioneers. Once certified, this extra 2% dividend is locked to your account for the lifetime of the system as part of our growth partner positioning.

Is there any fee to join the Ambassador Program?

No, it is 100% free to join[cite: 659]. We are looking for valuable partners, not customers[cite: 257]. Our transparent pricing model means we only profit when you succeed—no hidden fees or setup costs.

How do I track my referrals and commissions?

Upon approval, you will get access to your personalized Partner Dashboard[cite: 634]. You can track link clicks, successful VIP sign-ups, and lifetime passive earnings in real-time with full transparency.

Still have questions? Our multi-to-one service team is ready to support you 24/7.

Skip the frustrating verification hurdles and hit the ground running the moment you land in China.

About PT5 & F.A.Q

Got Questions?
We’ve Got Answers.

The P-T-5 Spirit

  • P
    People: A genuine network of local field experts.

    5 Promises: Best Price, Assured Quality, Transparent Process, Deep Customization, and Lifetime Support.

“Our commitment doesn’t end when you leave. We become your lifelong connection to China.”

Absolutely. For the physical $80 kit and rental options, you are using a pre-isolated, standalone Android device that is entirely separate from your primary personal phone. Your primary data remains untouched.

The rental package requires a $50 hardware deposit. Simply leave the device at your hotel’s front desk before your departure from China. We will arrange a courier (SF Express) to pick it up. Once we verify the device is undamaged, the deposit will be fully refunded to your original payment method immediately.

Yes! In addition to the translated bilingual quick-start guide cards included in your kit, our concierge team is available 24/7 online. Having trouble ordering at a restaurant or talking to a driver? Just take a photo or send a voice memo, and we will translate and guide you through it instantly.

Absolutely! You can book individual services. VIP members enjoy 20% off all guide services and priority booking.

We do both! Our sourcing service is one of our core pillars. We provide access to 1688 wholesale prices, help with quality control, and arrange shipping to your destination. Whether you’re buying for personal use or business, we’ve got you covered.

That’s exactly why we exist! Your Local Guide meets you at the airport with a pre-configured phone or eSIM. We set up Alipay with your foreign card, so you can pay like a local. We handle all translations and navigation throughout your trip.

Yes, all our services are available à la carte. You can book medical escort services, sourcing trips, cultural experiences, or any combination. The VIP membership offers savings if you use multiple services.

We offer two options: (1) Instant 5G eSIM – scan and install, no physical SIM needed, direct access to Google/WhatsApp via HK/SG roaming. (2) “China-Ready” phone – pre-activated with WeChat, Alipay, and Didi, with your foreign card linked at pickup.

We currently have verified Local Guides in 30+ cities including Shanghai, Beijing, Guangzhou, Shenzhen, Hangzhou, Chengdu, Xi’an, Suzhou, Nanjing, Wuhan, and more. Contact us if your destination isn’t listed – we may still be able to help!.

We accept PayPal, credit cards, and Alipay/WeChat Pay. For large amounts, we recommend low-cost international transfer services like Wise, Payoneer, PingPong, and XTransfer. We also support local currency payments.

Yes! One VIP membership payment covers up to 4 family members on the same trip. You’ll have one dedicated guide and travel together in a 5-seater vehicle.

We understand plans change. Cancellations made 7+ days before service receive a full refund. Within 7 days, we offer rescheduling or credit toward future services. Emergency situations are handled case by case.

We help you source products at 1688 wholesale prices, conduct quality checks, and arrange shipping. You can carry items back (free), use small parcel air freight (from $15/kg, 5-10 days), or sea freight for large items (from $3/kg, 30-45 days). Insurance is available at 3% of order value.

China has world-class medical facilities, especially in major cities. We partner with top-tier hospitals and clinics. Our medical escort service ensures you have translation support and guidance throughout your healthcare journey. Many procedures cost 50-70% less than in Western countries.

The 144-hour visa-free transit allows eligible travelers to stay in designated Chinese cities for up to 6 days without a visa, provided you have a confirmed onward ticket to a third country. We can help you understand if this applies to your itinerary.

Customer satisfaction is our priority. If you’re not satisfied with a service, please contact us immediately. We offer partial or full refunds depending on the situation and how much of the service was used.

Yes! Groups of 5+ people receive special discounts. Contact us with your group size and itinerary for a custom quote. Larger groups may require multiple guides.

All our Local Guides are fluent in English and Mandarin Chinese. Some guides also speak other languages like Japanese, Korean, French, German, and Spanish. Let us know your language preference when booking.

Yes, we can recommend and book hotels that suit your budget and preferences. VIP members receive priority booking at partner hotels with special rates.

We monitor flight statuses and adjust pickup times accordingly. If your flight is significantly delayed, just let us know and we’ll reschedule your guide service at no extra charge.

Yes! Just contact your Local Guide or our support team. We can extend your guide services, adjust your itinerary, and help with any additional bookings you need.

We’re always looking for passionate locals who love sharing their city! Requirements include fluent English, deep local knowledge, and excellent communication skills. Contact us with your resume and city to apply.

We currently have 50+ verified part-time Local Guides. However, we can quickly connect with over 50,000 potential candidates including stay-at-home moms, students, and other part-time workers. We can train and onboard new guides within two weeks. We are a light-asset company with a flexible workforce policy, providing standardized PT5 services to our guests.

We can find a Local Guide in your desired city within one week at no extra cost. Our network extends beyond the listed cities, and we can quickly recruit and train qualified guides in most locations across China.

Our Services

Four Ways We Transform Your Trip

From authentic local experiences to wholesale sourcing, we handle everything so you can focus on enjoying China.

Local Life

Live Like a Local

Experience authentic Chinese life through our carefully curated local experiences.

Part 1

Family Dinner

Customized Dietary Needs

Full Translation Support

Sourcing

Source Direct from Origin

“Let us calculate if we can save you more than your flight ticket?”

Access 1688 wholesale prices and Chinese brands directly. We handle procurement, quality control, and shipping to your doorstep. [cite: 880, 881]


1688 Hot Products


Chinese Brands

How We Calculate Prices

Transparent pricing breakdown

Carry-on Flight Price Formula:
Factory Price (incl. domestic shipping)+
Storage & Packaging (1%)+
Service Fee (10%)+
Domestic Tax (3%)+
Payment Fee (1% Standard / 5% PayPal)=

Total PriceFinal Price

Door-to-Door Shipping Formula:
Factory Price (incl. domestic shipping)+
Storage & Packaging (1%)+
Service Fee (10%)+
Domestic Tax (3%)+
Foreign Tax (Quoted by destination)+
Int’l Shipping (Quoted by route)+
Insurance Fee (Optional, 4%)+
Payment Fee (1% Standard / 5% PayPal)=

Total PriceFinal Price

Service Fee Tiers:
Standard/Returning (10%) |
New Member 1st Purchase (8%) |
Annual VIP Member (6.6%)

* Payment Fees: 0% for RMB transfer / 1% for standard foreign currency / 5% for PayPal Commercial.

* Insurance (Optional): The 4% fee covers full compensation for package damage or loss during international transit.

Shipping Options

Carry-on Flight

Bring products back in your luggage. Best for small items and samples.

  • Fastest delivery
  • No customs fees under limit
  • Personal inspection

See price formula above

Small Parcel Air

We ship small items via air freight to your designated address.

  • 5-10 business days
  • Tracking included
  • Door-to-door delivery

From $15/kg

Large Item Sea Freight

Economical shipping for bulk orders and heavy, large items.

  • 30-45 days transit
  • Most economical option
  • Full container option

From $3/kg

Insurance Option

Protection for your shipments

Good News: Carry-on flight items do NOT require insurance — your luggage stays with you throughout the journey. Insurance is only recommended for sea freight and air shipping packages.

Important: Freight forwarders typically offer NO compensation for lost or damaged goods. With so many intermediaries between factory and buyer, responsibility often gets passed around.

For sea freight and air shipping packages, our insurance option provides peace of mind. We cover your package against damage or loss during transit. If anything happens, we provide full replacement at no additional cost—no questions asked.

Full replacement coverage
No deductible
Easy claims process

Insurance fee: 4.5% of order value (sea/air shipping only)

Logistics

Seamless Travel Support

From visa eligibility to airport pickups and navigating airline baggage rules, we handle all the complex logistics so you don’t have to.

Check Your Visa Eligibility

Enter your passport issuing country to instantly see your entry options.



Data reflects the latest 2026 China 240-Hour & 30-Day entry policies.

Great News! You are Visa-Free.

Citizens of can enter China without a visa for up to 30 days. Just book your flight and you are ready to go!

240-Hour (10 Days) Transit Exemption!

Citizens of can stay in China for up to 10 days (240 hours) without a visa. Cross-province travel is now permitted!
Note: Requires a connecting flight to a third country/region. PT5 can help design a compliant itinerary!

Standard Visa Required

Citizens of currently need a tourist/business visa.
Don’t worry! PT5 provides official invitation letters and itinerary proofs to ensure a smooth application. Visa fees have been reduced by 25% until Dec 2026.

Visa Assistance

We guide you through visa applications and 144-hour transit policies.

Trip Planning

Custom itinerary design based on your interests and schedule.

Airline Baggage Policies

Maximize your sourcing trip by understanding what you can bring back on the plane.

Airline Carry-on Size Checked Bag Business Class Excess Fee
CAAir China 1 × 5kg 55×40×20cm 1 × 23kg 2 × 32kg $15/kg
MUChina Eastern 1 × 5kg 55×40×20cm 1 × 23kg 2 × 32kg $12/kg
CZChina Southern 1 × 5kg 55×40×20cm 1 × 23kg 2 × 32kg $15/kg
HUHainan Airlines 1 × 5kg 55×40×20cm 1 × 23kg 2 × 32kg $18/kg
CXCathay Pacific 1 × 7kg 56×36×23cm 1 × 30kg 2 × 32kg $25/kg
SQSingapore Airlines 1 × 7kg 56×36×23cm 1 × 30kg 2 × 32kg $30/kg
UAUnited Airlines 1 × No limit* 56×35×22cm 1 × 23kg ($60) 2 × 32kg $100-200/bag
DLDelta Air Lines 1 × No limit* 56×35×22cm 1 × 23kg ($60) 2 × 32kg $100-200/bag
EKEmirates 1 × 7kg 55×38×20cm 1 × 30-35kg 2 × 32kg $50-75/kg
QRQatar Airways 1 × 7kg 50×37×25cm 1 × 30kg 2 × 32kg $50-75/kg

Weight Enforcement

Chinese airlines are strict about carry-on weight limits. We recommend weighing your bags before departure to avoid excess fees at the gate.

Sourcing Tip

If you’re sourcing products, consider shipping separately via our logistics services. It’s often cheaper than airline excess baggage fees.

About Us

PT5 China

“Serve the People”

PT5 China is more than a travel service — it’s a movement to connect the world with authentic China through local eyes and genuine human connections.

P

People-Powered Real Connections

Real locals, real connections. Our network is built on people, not algorithms. We believe the best way to see China is through the eyes of a local friend.

T

Transparent Total Clarity

No hidden fees, no kickbacks, no surprises. We’ve eliminated the traditional tourist traps to ensure that what you see is exactly what you pay.

5

Five Promises Our Guarantee

Our commitment to excellence: Best Prices, Quality Assurance, Full Transparency, Tailored Customization, and Lifetime Support.

Our Ecosystem

A Global Bridge Built by Local Passion

We operate as a distributed network of passionate locals. While our guides work independently, they are unified by the PT5 brand and a shared commitment to authentic service.

Localized Wisdom

Every guide lives in the city they serve, knowing every hidden gem and shortcut.

Lean Operations

By removing agency middle-men, we keep costs low while delivering premium experiences.

Personal Connections

Every guide is a real person with genuine passion. No scripts, no robots — just authentic connection.

Unified Management

Operating under the PT5 brand with standardized quality and service guarantees across China.


More Than a Trip

  • Free Trip Planning for you and your friends, even for your future return visits.

  • Remote Sourcing — your guide remains your dedicated procurement agent after you leave.

  • A Lifelong Connection who is always just a WhatsApp or WeChat message away.
